steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Probability of an event = (favorable outcomes) / (total outcomes). The table shows 10 igneous rocks out of 70 total.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘$\frac{10}{27}$’: This divides by the number of sedimentary rocks (27), not the total. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘$\frac{10}{33}$’: This divides by the number of metamorphic rocks (33), not the total. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘$\frac{10}{60}$’: This divides by the number of non-igneous rocks (33 + 27 = 60), not the total. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘$\frac{10}{70}$’: 10 igneous rocks divided by 70 total rocks — correct probability formula. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
